products.name: Wireless Headphones
products.description: Premium Bluetooth headphones with active noise cancellation, 30-hour battery life, and superior sound quality. Perfect for music lovers and professionals.

products.name: Smart Watch Pro
products.description: Advanced fitness tracker with heart rate monitor, GPS tracking, sleep analysis, and waterproof design. Track your health goals with style.

products.name: Bluetooth Speaker
products.description: Portable waterproof speaker with 360-degree sound, deep bass, and 12-hour battery life. Perfect for outdoor adventures and parties.

products.name: Wireless Mouse
products.description: Ergonomic wireless mouse with adjustable DPI, silent clicks, and long battery life. Compatible with all devices and operating systems.

products.name: USB-C Hub
products.description: 7-in-1 USB-C hub with HDMI, USB 3.0 ports, SD card reader, and power delivery. Essential for modern laptops and tablets.

products.name: Webcam HD
products.description: 1080p HD webcam with auto-focus, built-in microphone, and wide-angle lens. Perfect for video calls and streaming.

products.name: Running Shoes
products.description: Lightweight running shoes with cushioned sole, breathable mesh upper, and excellent grip. Available in multiple colors and sizes.

products.name: Sunglasses Classic
products.description: Polarized sunglasses with 100% UV protection, durable frame, and stylish design. Includes protective case and cleaning cloth.

products.name: Leather Watch
products.description: Classic analog watch with genuine leather strap, stainless steel case, and water resistance. Timeless elegance for any occasion.

products.name: Canvas Sneakers
products.description: Comfortable canvas sneakers with rubber sole and classic design. Perfect for casual everyday wear and weekend outings.

products.name: Baseball Cap
products.description: Adjustable baseball cap with embroidered logo, breathable fabric, and curved brim. One size fits all with snapback closure.

products.name: Coffee Maker
products.description: Programmable coffee maker with thermal carafe, brew strength control, auto shut-off, and 12-cup capacity. Start your day right.

products.name: Desk Lamp LED
products.description: Modern LED desk lamp with adjustable brightness levels, flexible arm, USB charging port, and energy-efficient design.

products.name: Plant Pot Set
products.description: Set of 3 ceramic plant pots with drainage holes, saucers, and modern design. Perfect for indoor plants, succulents, and herbs.

products.name: Wall Clock
products.description: Silent wall clock with large numbers, modern design, and accurate quartz movement. Battery operated and easy to install.

products.name: Throw Pillow Set
products.description: Set of 2 decorative throw pillows with soft covers, hidden zippers, and premium filling. Add comfort and style to any room.

products.name: Scented Candles
products.description: Set of 3 aromatherapy candles with natural soy wax, essential oils, and 40-hour burn time. Create a relaxing atmosphere.

products.name: Yoga Mat Premium
products.description: Extra thick yoga mat with non-slip surface, carrying strap, and eco-friendly material. Perfect for yoga, pilates, and stretching.

products.name: Water Bottle
products.description: Insulated stainless steel water bottle keeps drinks cold for 24 hours or hot for 12 hours. Leak-proof lid and wide mouth opening.

products.name: Resistance Bands
products.description: Set of 5 resistance bands with different strength levels, door anchor, handles, and carrying bag. Complete home workout solution.

products.name: Jump Rope
products.description: Speed jump rope with adjustable length, comfortable handles, and smooth ball bearings. Perfect for cardio and fitness training.

products.name: Gym Bag
products.description: Spacious gym bag with shoe compartment, water bottle holder, and multiple pockets. Durable and stylish for all your workout gear.

products.name: Laptop Backpack
products.description: Durable laptop backpack with padded compartment for 15.6" laptops, USB charging port, water-resistant material, and multiple pockets.

products.name: Phone Case
products.description: Protective phone case with shock absorption, raised edges, and slim design. Available for all major phone models.

products.name: Wallet Leather
products.description: Genuine leather wallet with RFID blocking, multiple card slots, and bill compartment. Slim design fits comfortably in pocket.

products.name: Keychain Multi-tool
products.description: Compact multi-tool keychain with bottle opener, screwdrivers, and ruler. Made from stainless steel and perfect for everyday carry.

products.name: Travel Adapter
products.description: Universal travel adapter with 4 USB ports, works in 150+ countries, and includes surge protection. Essential for international travel.
